description: Leaves a trail of dots showing the past positions of a moving point during animation. The point must be driven by a variableanimator for positions to accumulate.
utility: Show the path traced by a moving point during animation

arguments.name: point
arguments.description: The moving point whose positions are recorded as dots

examples.scenario: Trace point on height function plot driven by variable animator
examples.expression:
G2 = g2d(at(4,35), 20, 20, range(-2,10), type(plotting))
H = point(G2, t, h(t))
trace_h = tracepoint(G2, H)

examples.scenario: Trace point moving along unit circle
examples.expression:
varanim_t = variableanimator(at(2, 30), "t", 0, 360)
G = g2d(at(4, 1), size(20), range(-2, 2), type(geometry))
uc = circle(G, point(G, 0, 0), radius(1))
P = anglepoint(G, uc, t, c(crimson), s(5))
trace_1 = tracepoint(G, P)
play_anim = playanimator(varanim_t, t(8))

notes: Takes exactly 2 arguments: graph and point. No third parameter.
The point must move via animation (variableanimator + playanimator) for the trail to appear. Static points produce no trail.
